positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial forest scene illustration. The central element features glowing, mystical woodland creatures—such as iridescent owls and fox silhouettes—surrounded by bioluminescent flora and floating geometric moons and stars. The style is a fusion of engraved etchings, psychedelic nature art, and vibrant watercolor washes, rendered with clean, bold lines perfect for printing on dark apparel. Utilize a color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, brilliant gold, and emerald green. Focus on strong contrast and crisp silhouettes against a dark background. The composition must be centered, suitable for chest placement, and evoke a sense of calm wonder and mystery. Vector illustration style, perfect print resolution, intricate details.
